name: Pipeshift
description: Cloud platform for fine-tuning and serving open-source LLMs with managed infrastructure and model ownership.

seo.title: Pipeshift — AI API / SDK for Developers
seo.meta_description: Pipeshift: Cloud platform for fine-tuning and serving open-source LLMs with managed infrastructure and model ownership.

when_to_use: Deploying open-source LLMs with one-click managed hosting
Migrating from OpenAI to self-hosted models without code changes
Running private fine-tuned models with OpenAI-compatible endpoints
Scaling inference capacity for open LLMs without DevOps overhead

pros: You keep model weights and ownership
cons: Self-hosting feels harder without their platform
review.verdict: Reasonable if model ownership matters, but Together, Fireworks, and Modal often beat them on ecosystem depth.
review.best_for: Teams fine-tuning open LLMs who need to own the weights
review.not_for: Teams fine with closed-model APIs like GPT or Claude

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: No explicit peak-lock evidence; default FALSE per rules.
